rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §37.202, which establishes the purpose of the school safety and security center. No overlap in subject matter.
quote:
The purpose of the center is to serve as:
(1) a central location for school safety and security information, including research, training, and technical assistance related to successful school safety and security programs;
_note: No conflict. Educ. Code §37.202 addresses school safety center purpose; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. Unrelated statutes.
